evidence: "Best thing since West Wing. Great way to get the real story on many current events."
"This is a documentary that you wish everybody in the country would see."
"There were several surprising turns and outcomes that I had already made my mind up about, and thought I knew how it was going to go, but then was proven wrong."
"It's raw in places, but gives us insight into how people in poverty have to survive."
"The film maker did some good work here re-creating the story of her family, But, she dragged it out so long I almost left it."
"Excellent; again. Film making at it's very best."
"I loved the unusual way this was filmed."
"It proved to me that somebody can achieve greatness no matter what circumstance they grew up in."
"It's something we all need to see before we make blanket judgments about people we only see from afar."
"It gives us insight into how people in poverty have to survive."

summary: The user has a strong preference for engaging dramas and documentaries that feature complex narratives and high production quality. They appreciate fast pacing but have mixed feelings about length, indicating a desire for concise storytelling. Overall, they value emotional resonance and insightful content that reflects real-life experiences.
